report_title: Phase 2 Visualizations Integration Plan for render_html()

actual_functions_available.name: create_jobs_distribution_map_enhanced
actual_functions_available.signature: (metrics: ReportMetrics, locale: str = 'en', heatmap: bool = True) -> str
actual_functions_available.note: Wrapper that calls create_city_heatmap_layer or create_city_cluster_map based on heatmap parameter

geographic_heatmap.notes: Geographic heatmap is already in use via _render_maps_section, which calls create_jobs_distribution_map(). The enhancement (enhanced version) is available in geo_charts but not yet used.

actual_functions_available.name: create_seaborn_heatmap
actual_functions_available.signature: (pivot_df: pd.DataFrame, title: str = '...', figsize: tuple[int, int] = (12, 7), cmap: str = 'RdYlGn', annot: bool = True, fmt: str = 'd', cbar_label: str = 'Job Count') -> plt.Figure

actual_functions_available.name: figure_to_base64_seaborn
actual_functions_available.signature: (fig: plt.Figure, format: str = 'png', dpi: int = 100) -> str
actual_functions_available.note: Converts matplotlib figures to base64 PNG data URI

actual_functions_available.name: create_plotly_heatmap
actual_functions_available.signature: (pivot_df: pd.DataFrame, title: str = '...', colorscale: str = 'RdYlGn', locale: str = 'en') -> go.Figure

actual_functions_available.name: create_seniority_skills_heatmap_v2
actual_functions_available.note: Alternative Plotly-based heatmap that works with raw records

actual_functions_available.name: build_tech_seniority_pivot_from_records
actual_functions_available.signature: (records: tuple[JoinedObservationRecord, ...], top_n_skills: int = 10, top_n_seniorities: Optional[int] = None) -> pd.DataFrame
actual_functions_available.note: Builds pivot table from raw observation records. Requires access to metrics.observations or similar.

tech_seniority_heatmap.integration_challenge: ReportMetrics does not currently expose 'observations' or JoinedObservationRecord tuples. This heatmap requires raw record-level data, not aggregated counts.
tech_seniority_heatmap.recommended_approach: Add Tech×Seniority heatmap to _render_analysis_section() as separate visualization, but this requires either: (A) Modifying ReportMetrics to expose raw records, or (B) Building pivot table from existing aggregated dimensions

word_cloud.notes: Word cloud is already fully integrated into the analysis section

priority_2_ENHANCEMENT_OPTIONAL: Enhanced geographic heatmap with create_jobs_distribution_map_enhanced (currently using basic create_jobs_distribution_map)
priority_3_BLOCKED: Tech×Seniority heatmap (requires record-level data not currently available in ReportMetrics)

next_steps.step: 1. Verify current word cloud and geographic heatmap rendering
next_steps.action: Run tests to confirm Phase 2 visualizations are correctly embedded

prerequisites: Modify ReportMetrics class to expose raw JoinedObservationRecord tuples
OR: Build pivot table from aggregated seniority_counts + tech_stack_counts

.section-maps.special_handling: Map containers have min-height constraints for interactivity

.section-analysis.purpose: Container for tech analysis visualizations (heatmap + word cloud)

.chart-container.purpose: For embedded base64 PNG images (Plotly/seaborn charts)

.map-container-wrapper.purpose: For folium/leaflet HTML maps with special styling

.analysis-container.purpose: For tech analysis visualizations with h3 titles

recommended_css_for_techseniority_heatma.rationale: Fits existing design pattern for tech-related visualizations

section_naming_convention.pattern: id='<plural_or_section_name>' and h2 title with escape(text[locale]['key'])

existing_examples.h2_title: Job Distribution Map (from labels dict in _render_maps_section)

section_naming_convention.localization_approach: Each section renderer defines locale-specific labels in a dict (see _render_charts_section line 543-560, _render_maps_section line 604-613)

_render_charts_section.pattern: Tries to import → create_all_charts() → iterate over chart dict → convert to base64 PNG → build grid
_render_charts_section.error_handling: Try-catch with ImportError, Exception handling for each chart

_render_maps_section.pattern: Tries to import → create_jobs_distribution_map() → wraps folium HTML in container divs
_render_maps_section.improvement_available: Can upgrade to create_jobs_distribution_map_enhanced from geo_charts module

_render_analysis_section.pattern: Tries to import → try each visualization separately → build .analysis-container divs
_render_analysis_section.error_handling: Try-catch for ImportError + per-visualization Exception handling

optional_dependencies_handling.current_approach: Each section renderer has try-except ImportError block

affected_modules.missing_handler: Returns empty string (skips word cloud only, keeps heatmap if available)

recommended_pattern_for_tech_seniority.code_template: import heatmap_design functions with try-except ImportError
recommended_pattern_for_tech_seniority.fallback: Return empty string or skip visualization silently

geographic_heatmap.step_3_OPTIONAL: Update CSS if needed (current map-container-wrapper styling is sufficient)

tech_seniority_heatmap.step_1: Determine if ReportMetrics will expose raw observation records
tech_seniority_heatmap.step_3_IF_YES: Add section to render_html() and navigation bar
tech_seniority_heatmap.step_4_IF_YES: Add localized labels to _TEXT dict and section renderer

files_already_modified.status: Phase 2 components present but may not be optimally configured

files_not_yet_modified.reason: Tech×Seniority heatmap section title not yet localized

strengths: Consistent error handling with ImportError checks
Graceful degradation when optional dependencies missing
Per-visualization try-catch blocks in analysis section
areas_for_improvement: map_html = create_jobs_distribution_map(metrics, locale) still uses old import source (should be geo_charts)
Tech×Seniority requires architectural change to ReportMetrics
No logging of skipped sections (silent failure is good UX but hard to debug)
